caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses stands against a plain dark gray background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She wears a light green tunic featuring an embroidered neckline with red and gold floral patterns and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, her facial expression changes from a wide smile with teeth showing to a more neutral, open-mouthed speaking position. Her hands move from being positioned slightly apart to gesturing more actively outward to her sides. The camera remains in a steady medium shot, capturing her from the waist up, while the lighting and background remain consistent throughout the clip.
